title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Selebi-phikwe Town Council (retail Sales of Traditional Beer) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : Selebi-phikwe Town Council (retail Sales of Traditional Beer) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the Selebi-Phikwe Town Council (Retail Sales of Traditional Beer) Bye-laws*.
*>Originally made under the Township Act now repealed, these regulations have been continued under s 94(2) of the Local Government Act, 2013.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Beer to be sold on licensed premises
provisions.content:
3. Beer to be sold on licensed premises
(1) No person shall sell or buy any traditional beer by retail within the township except in a beerhall conducted by the council, or on premises licensed in terms of these Bye-laws:

definitions.definition: licensed in terms of these Bye-laws
the area of jurisdiction of Selebi-Phikwe Town Council
